en.title: Automobile Mechanic
en.prompt: Need somebody with expertise on automobiles regarding troubleshooting solutions like; diagnosing problems/errors present both visually & within engine parts in order to figure out what's causing them (like lack of oil or power issues) & suggest required replacements while recording down details such fuel consumption type etc., First inquiry –

metaDescription: Car trouble? Diagnose engine issues visually and audit parts. Suggest replacements and record fuel consumption details. Try it now.

faq.q: Can the AI give accurate repair plans from symptom descriptions?
faq.a: For common issues (hard starting, strange noises, oil leaks) it can give diagnostic directions, but actual repair requires hands-on inspection. The AI can't use a stethoscope or pinpoint which bearing is noisy. Verify part numbers with a dealer before buying, don't shop online blindly.

faq.q: For DIY minor fixes, is the AI's procedure reliable?
faq.a: Simple tasks (oil change, coolant refill, wiper replacement) the steps are mostly reliable. For disassembling engines or transmissions, go to a professional shop. DIY on core components voids warranty and ends up costing more in repairs.
